page.title: Users
page.note: Admins manage all accounts here. Members only see and act within their assigned teams.

empty.title: No users
empty.message: Create the first user to get started.

noMatches.title: No matching users
noMatches.message: No users match the current filters. Try clearing them.

resetPasswordDisabledTitle: Unblock the account before resetting its password.

confirm.unblockMessage: Unblock {{email}}? They will be able to log in again.
confirm.blockMessage: Block {{email}}? They will be signed out and unable to log in until unblocked.

create.title: Create user
create.name: Name
create.nameHint: Optional. Leave blank to show the email.
create.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters, or choose auto-generate.

edit.title: Edit user
edit.name: Name
edit.nameHint: Optional. Leave blank to show the email.
edit.adminHint: Admins ignore team scoping. The system always keeps at least one active admin.
edit.adminTeamsHint: Admins can access all teams; membership is optional.

reset.title: Reset password
reset.generatedBody: A new password was generated for {{email}}. Their existing sessions have been signed out.
reset.confirmBody: Generate a new password for {{email}}? This signs them out of all sessions. The new password is shown only once.

generatedPassword.warning: Copy this password now — it is shown only once and cannot be retrieved later.

teamCheckboxList.empty: No teams exist yet. Create a team first to assign membership.
